prestazioni: Engine swap to a **2.0L TSI EA888 Gen 3 (CJXB/CJXC)** with a **Garrett GTX3071R Gen II turbocharger** (1.05 A/R, 62mm compressor inducer) paired with a **Precision Turbo & Engine 46mm wastegate** for 380-420whp on **E85 fuel**, utilizing a **Bosch Motorsport 0261S02088 high-pressure fuel pump** and **Siemens DEKA 80lb/hr injectors** (PN: 7808000020).

Full **VR6 3.6L (CDVC/CDVA) intake manifold** conversion with **ITG Maxogen air filter** and **custom 3.5" aluminum intake piping** (TIG-welded, powder-coated in RAL 9005 Jet Black) to optimize airflow for the EA888 swap, paired with a **Vargas GC Stage 2+ intercooler** (core dimensions: 24" x 12" x 3.5").

Custom **034 Motorsport billet aluminum motor mounts** (PN: 034-10-0001) and **Neuspeed subframe collars** (PN: NSP-NS0110-01) to eliminate torque steer under boost, combined with a **02M 6-speed DSG transmission** (from a **Mk7 Golf R**) with a **South Bend Stage 3+ clutch** (organic/copper hybrid, 550ft-lb capacity) and **TCU tune via Cobb Accessport** (launch control set to 4,500 RPM).
estetica: **Rieger Tuning Sharan (7N) widebody kit** (fiberglass, OEM+ fitment) with **custom 3M 1080 Gloss Black vinyl wrap** (matte clear coat for UV protection), featuring **extended front fenders (30mm per side)** and **rear quarter panels (40mm per side)** to accommodate **ET45 10.5J BBS RS-GT II wheels** (99.5mm center bore, 5x112 PCD) with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (255/35/19 front, 285/30/19 rear)**.

**OEM VW Golf R (Mk7.5) front bumper** (modified with **custom carbon fiber splitter** from **Seibon Carbon**) and **Sharan-specific rear diffuser** (3D-printed ABS, painted in **RAL 7016 Anthracite Grey**) with **dual 3.5" titanium exhaust tips** (custom fabrication by **Supersprint**).

**Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (DFV)** (PN: 19-05-001) with **custom spring rates (8kg/mm front, 10kg/mm rear)** and **polyurethane bushings (Powerflex Black Series, PN: PFR9-410)** for chassis rigidity, paired with **H&R 25mm front / 20mm rear anti-roll bars** (PN: 546 600 02 / 546 601 02) and **Brembo GT 6-piston front calipers** (from **Audi RS6 C7**, 400mm rotors) with **Ferodo DS2500 pads**.
